title: UPI Circle Payment Credential
description: One-time cryptogram for a delegated UPI payment. Fetched by the platform from Razorpay before Complete Checkout. The cryptogram authorizes a single debit within the delegation mandate limits — no per-transaction buyer interaction is required. Extends payment_credential.json in the same pattern as token_credential.json.

type.description: Discriminator for UPI Circle cryptogram credential.

cryptogram.description: One-time cryptogram value issued by Razorpay. Single-use and time-limited — authorizes exactly one delegated debit. NPCI rejects reuse. The platform MUST fetch a fresh cryptogram for each transaction.

delegate_id.description: Reference to the delegation mandate this cryptogram was issued for. Enables the merchant PSP to route the payment correctly. Already present on the instrument — included here for routing convenience.

expires_at.description: RFC 3339 expiry timestamp. Platform MUST check this before submitting Complete Checkout and fetch a new cryptogram if expired.
